topics.label: LLMs & Reasoning
topics.description: Language models, chain-of-thought, reasoning, RLHF, alignment post-training, and evaluation of LLM capabilities.

topics.label: Diffusion & Flow Matching
topics.description: Diffusion models, score-based generative models, flow matching, consistency models, and related generative techniques.

topics.label: Reinforcement Learning & Agents
topics.description: Reinforcement learning, decision-making, autonomous agents, multi-agent systems, and planning.

topics.label: Graph Learning
topics.description: Graph neural networks, structured prediction on graphs, graph theory, knowledge graphs.

topics.label: Interpretability & Mechanistic Understanding
topics.description: Mechanistic interpretability, feature visualization, circuit analysis, probing, and explainability.

topics.label: Safety, Privacy & Alignment
topics.description: AI safety, alignment, jailbreaks, adversarial robustness, privacy, differential privacy, and membership inference.

topics.label: Theory & Optimization
topics.description: Optimization, learning theory, generalization bounds, convergence analysis, statistical learning.

topics.label: Vision & 3D
topics.description: Computer vision, 3D reconstruction, NeRF, Gaussian splatting, video understanding, image generation.

topics.label: Multimodal & Speech
topics.description: Vision-language, multimodal models, speech recognition, text-to-speech, audio generation.

topics.label: Efficiency, Systems & Kernels
topics.description: Efficient inference, quantization, pruning, distillation, sparse models, GPU kernels, ML systems.

topics.label: Datasets, Benchmarks & Evaluation
topics.description: New datasets, benchmarks, evaluation protocols, and studies of existing benchmarks.

topics.label: Causal & Statistical Methods
topics.description: Causal inference, statistical methods, uncertainty quantification, Bayesian deep learning, conformal prediction.
